appraisal_events.evidence: « surtout grâce aux renseignements que Robert de Saint-Loup me donnait sur la vie privée des artistes, je voyais une autre pièce, muette et expressive, se jouer sous la pièce parlée »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator credits Robert as the insider source whose information unlocks a deeper, parallel drama behind the stage performance, positioning him as knowledgeable and enabling.

status_effects.explanation: Robert gains local authority as an informed guide whose backstage knowledge shapes the narrator’s perception.
